expectations.text: Form structure with form element wrapping label+input pairs
expectations.evidence: Line 43-87: form element properly contains multiple div(class := 'form-group') sections, each with label+input pair for username and email fields

expectations.text: Bootstrap className applied as tuple for multi-value attributes
expectations.evidence: Lines 35, 36, 48, 65, 80: All className attributes use proper tuple syntax: className := ("container", "mt-5"), className := ("row", "justify-content-center"), className := ("d-grid", "gap-2"), className := ("btn", "btn-primary")

expectations.text: Validation attributes (required, minlength, maxlength) properly applied
expectations.evidence: Lines 59-61: input elements have required, minlength := "3", maxlength := "20" attributes; Line 76: email field has required attribute

expectations.text: Label-input linking with htmlFor and id attributes
expectations.evidence: Lines 50-51: label(htmlFor := "username", class := "form-label"); Lines 56: id := "username" matches. Same pattern for email field at lines 67-68 and 73

expectations.text: Void elements (input) used without children, attributes only
expectations.evidence: Lines 53-62 and 70-77: input elements are self-closing with attributes only, no attempted child content

expectations.text: Proper nesting: form > div.form-group > (label, input) structure
expectations.evidence: Lines 43-87: form element contains multiple div(class := "form-group") sections, each wrapping a label followed by an input element in correct hierarchy
